CREATE TABLE soap_requests (id int, endpoint varchar(255), procedure_name varchar(255), params varchar(255));

DECLARE ret any;
ret := soap_call ('http://example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('str', 'G'));

DECLARE ret any;
ret := soap_call ('http://example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('str', 'A-Z'));

DECLARE ret any;
ret := soap_call ('http://example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('int', 100));

DECLARE ret any;
ret := soap_call ('http://example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('date', '2023-10-01'));

DECLARE ret any;
ret := soap_call ('http://example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('mixed', 'Hello', 123, '2023-10-01'));
CREATE TABLE soap_responses (id int, response_xml text);
INSERT INTO soap_requests (id, endpoint, procedure_name, params) SELECT 2, 'http://example.com', 'fishselect', vector ('str', 'H');

DECLARE ret any;
ret := soap_call ('http://example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('str', repeat('A', 255)));

DECLARE ret any;
ret := soap_call ('http://example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('str', ''));

DECLARE ret any;
ret := soap_call ('http://example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'getDetails', vector ('str', 'item1'), vector ('int', -1));
